system.description:
Discipline: Qinggong
Skill: Speed TN 6
Type: Normal
Qi: 2

This Technique allows you to make your body physically lighter, making it harder to hit you, but also making hits against you potentially more lethal. Make a Speed roll TN 6. On a Success, you may temporarily transfer your Hardiness points to Evade or Parry. The maximum number you can transfer is 1 per Qi level, but you do not have to do that many. You may also split them up. For example, a Qi level 3 user has 7 Hardiness, 6 Parry, and 6 Evade. She may transfer up to 3, and chooses to split them to 2 in Parry and 1 in Evade. This results in her Defenses being 4 Hardiness, 8 Parry, and 7 Evade. This change lasts 1 round per Rank in Qinggong. Cathartic: For each point of Hardiness you sacrifice, both Parry and Evade increase by 1.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: For each point of Hardiness you sacrifice, both Parry and Evade increase by 1.
